{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Life Well habitat
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Life Well habitat]] is a location where elixirs were refined.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
